vector-store-connector
**********************


Description
===========

A VectorStore Connector offers a lightweight and configurable
mechanism to continuously synchronize data from external systems into
the VectorStore at scale. It captures the configuration of the
datasource for data ingestion.


Available Commands
==================

* create

* create-vector-store-connector-oci-object-storage-configuration

* create-vector-store-connector-schedule-cron-config

* create-vector-store-connector-schedule-interval-config

* delete

* get

* update

* update-vector-store-connector-oci-object-storage-configuration

* update-vector-store-connector-schedule-cron-config

* update-vector-store-connector-schedule-interval-config
